name: Venomed Tongue
description:
Secrets must be unraveled, no matter how painful. This tattoo of braided tongues provides a +1 item bonus to Deception checks.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once per day

Effect Abraxas fills your tongue with venom, causing your deceptions to poison your foes. You use Deception to , , or . Choose one target against whom your Deception check succeeded; that target takes ] damage.
